Imports

alerts, schema

Types

ScreenerHistoryEntry = object
  timestamp*: Time
  configName*: string
  alerts*: seq[Alert]
  symbolsScanned*: int
  strategiesUsed*: int
  totalSignals*: int
A single screener run saved to history

Procs

                            entry2: ScreenerHistoryEntry): tuple[

                         symbolsScanned: int; strategiesUsed: int;
                         historyDir: string = "screener_history"): void {.
